title: [SETTINGS]
text: [SETTINGS] Use the [SETTINGS] section to control various aspects of your Uniface application's behavior and appearance. The available settings can affect application language, appearance, I/O behavior, testing, compatibility settings, and more. Syntax [SETTINGS] Setting {{ = } Value } For example: [SETTINGS] $PUTMESS_LOG_FILE = ide.log $SEARCH_RESOURCES = resources_only Copy Arguments Setting — name of the setting. Value —value of the setting. If not specified, the default value is used. See the individual assignment settings for their default values. Settings: General Application Environment $CPU $ENHANCED_EDIT $ioprint $LEADING_LISTID_SPACES $LICENSE_OPTIONS $MAX_QUE $MEMORY $NO_BUSY $NUM_NULL_CMP_ZERO $NUM_SPACE_CMP_ZERO $PUTMESS_LOG_FILE $SEARCH_SKELETON $sys_charset $TIMEOUT $TRANSCRIPT_LOG_FILE $variation $WIDE_CHAR_BEHAVIOR Settings: Network and Integration $ALLOW_FOREIGN_THREADS $DEFAULT_NET $DEFAULT_TCP_HOST /dnp $IPC_ASYNC $NET_FMT $NET_REESTABLISH_MSGID $NET_TIMEOUT $NO_DB_RECONNECT $SOAP_CALLIN_CB $SOAP_CALLIN_FAULT Settings: Data I/O $ASYNC_OPEN_UST $CASCADE_TRIGGER $def_charset $ENABLE_CACHE_ALWAYS $FILL_DBMS_FIELDS $MAX_CACHE_SIZE $NUMERIC_CHECK $STOP_ON_VALERR Two-Phase Commit $USP_CHECK_NEW_OCC Settings: File I/O and Printing $FILE_NEW_LINE $FILELOAD_SINGLE_LINE $NEW_LINE $NO_BOM_UTF8 $PRT_FILE_DELAY $SUPPRESS_FORM_FEED $TEXT_FILE_EXTENSIONS $ZIP_CHARSET $ZIP_NEW_LINE Settings: National Language Support $EXTENDED_SYNTAX $FULL_SYNTAX $GAIJI $HANKAKU_FONT1 $LANGUAGE $NO_UNIFIELDS $NLS_CASE $NLS_DATE_UNIFACE_PARSER $NLS_DATETIME_UNIFACE_PARSER $NLS_FORMAT $NLS_INTERNAL_TIME $NLS_LOCALE $NLS_SORT_ORDER $NLS_TIME_ZONE $RTL_APPLICATION $RTL_APPLICATION $RTL_FIELDS $RTL_PRINTING $USE_EXTRA_JIS_CHARS Settings: Compiler $ALLOW_NOBREAK_SPACE $GENERATE_CMI $INCLUDE_NOT_FOUND_LEVEL $LISTING_LEVEL $MESSAGE_LEVEL $NO_DEBUG $RESOURCES_OUTPUT $SYMBOL_TABLE Settings: Testing and Debugging $DATE_TIME $ENABLE_USER_3GL_DEBUGGING $JSON_INDENT $JSON_SHOWNAMES $PROC_LOG_FILE $proc_profiling $PROC_PROFILING_SEPARATOR $proc_tracing $proc_tracing_addition $TEST_MODE_COMPONENTS Settings: Windows and Character Mode App $GUI $HIDE_ALL_PREVIOUS_FORMS $DISPLAY $DISPLAY_INIT $DEFAULT_TERM $MACRO_FIRST $SWAP_GOLD_PROFILES The following settings are only relevant to character mode or to Windows applications that make use of Uniface index colors. $ACTIVE_FIELD $ACTIVE_FIELD_FIRST ucheckbox (CheckBox) $CHUI_FORM_BORDER $CUROCC_VIDEO $CUROCC_VIDEO_HLT $DEF_BACKGROUND $DEF_CUROCC_VIDEO $DEF_VIDEO $FORM_TITLE ulistbox (ListBox ) $MENU_BAR $MESSAGE_LINE $PROFILE_VIDEO $RADIO_BUTTON $SWAP_COLORS Settings: Uniface Router $MAX_CLIENTS $MAX_FILES $MAX_MONS $MAX_SERVERS $USE_PMQ Settings: Compatibility $CHECK_SIGNATURE_ID $CENTURY_BREAK $DSP_FIELDLIST $E6_BASE_DATE $LENGTH_RAW_IN_BYTES $META_IN_TRX $MOD_VERSION $NO_LMK_NULL $NO_VALREP_CHECK $NO_TICKS $NUMERIC_LAYOUT_CHAR $OLD_ASKMESS $OLD_LIB_PATH $PROMPT_SCROLL $SEARCH_RESOURCES $SPACE_FOR_MINUS_SIGN $STOP_ON_DIV_BY_ZERO $STORE_BOOLEANS_AS_FALSE $USP_NED_TEXTAREA $V7_INCLUDE_FIELDS Data Validation in Web Applications Related Links Assignment Settings An assignment setting is a setting or definition in an assignment file that determines one aspect of the behavior or environment of a Uniface application. Assignment settings can specify the location of application resources and servers, set environment variables, define application logicals, and set Uniface system settings to influence runtime behavior.
